title: Search a 2D Matrix
description:
Search a 2D Matrix

Leetcode 74. Search a 2D Matrix

You are given an m x n 2D integer matrix with the following two properties:

  • Each row is sorted in non-decreasing order.
  • The first integer of each row is greater than the last integer of the previous row.

Given an integer target, return True if target is in the matrix, or False otherwise.

You must write a solution in O(log(m * n)) time complexity.

Examples

  • Input: matrix = [[1,3,5,7],[10,11,16,20],[23,30,34,60]], target = 3
    Output: True
  • Input: matrix = [[1,3,5,7],[10,11,16,20],[23,30,34,60]], target = 13
    Output: False

Constraints

  • m == matrix.length
  • n == matrix[i].length
  • 1 <= m, n <= 100
  • -10^4 <= matrix[i][j], target <= 10^4
solution_text:
Search a 2D Matrix

Key Insight: Treat the matrix as a flattened sorted array of length m * n. A virtual index i maps to row i // n and column i % n.

Algorithm:

  1. Set left = 0, right = m * n - 1.
  2. Binary search on the virtual index.
  3. Convert mid back to matrix[mid // n][mid % n] for comparison.
  4. Return True if found, False otherwise.

Time Complexity: O(log(m * n))

Space Complexity: O(1)
